text:
Demographic and background information, including household
- Physical and mental health
- Cognition
- Functional limitations
- Employment
- Disability
- Health insurance
- Assets and Income
- Wills, including advanced directives

- Linked files include:- Medicare denominator/Beneficiary Summary File (BSF)
- Medicare fee-for-service (FFS) claims
- Part D drug event (PDE) file
- Assessment data Minimum Data Set (MDS)- Home Health Outcome and Assessment Information Set (OASIS)

- Medicaid
